name: SF itinerary — observation-derived goal (non-executable subject)
task_prompt: Using `bar build make witness ground gate falsify atomic`, plan a one-day itinerary for a first-time visitor to San Francisco who wants to avoid tourist crowds, prefers walking, and has a vegetarian diet. The subject is the visitor's situation — not executable software. Produce a structured plan only.
notes: Non-software frame. Tests Frame 24: agent must adapt 'run the subject' to mean 'examine the visitor's situation as it currently stands.' Observation section must appear before governing goal heading. Governing goal heading must contain a literal substring from the observation (e.g. 'tourist crowds', 'walking', 'vegetarian') — not a synonym.
